'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 105''' was the one hundred fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 31]], [[2003]]. The issue was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]], [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Michael Schiavetta]]. It also featured original artwork by [[Nick Foreman]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] technology
*[[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|Republic Assault Ship]]
